# P3.5 — Auto-generated table of contents

## Priority: P3

## Problem

Long policy documents have many sections but no nav to jump between them.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Floating/sticky TOC panel for pages with ≥3 heading blocks
- [ ] TOC lists all `HeadingBlock` items with anchor links
- [ ] Clicking scrolls to that heading
- [ ] Current heading highlighted (scroll spy)
- [ ] Hidden on mobile (<768 px) and when <3 headings
- [ ] No new dependencies
- [ ] `npm run build` exits 0

## Files to modify

| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `src/pages/documents/WikiPageView.tsx` | Extract headings, TOC panel, scroll spy |
| `src/pages/documents/WikiBlockRenderer.tsx` | Add `id` to rendered headings |

## Add id to headings (WikiBlockRenderer)

```tsx
case 'heading': {
  const id = `heading-${block.text.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-').replace(/(^-|-$)/g, '')}`
  const Tag = `h${block.level}` as 'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3'
  return <Tag id={id} key={idx} className={/* existing classes */}>{block.text}</Tag>
}
```

## Heading extraction

```tsx
const headings = useMemo(
  () => page.blocks
    .filter((b): b is HeadingBlock => b.kind === 'heading')
    .map((b) => ({
      text: b.text, level: b.level,
      id: `heading-${b.text.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-').replace(/(^-|-$)/g, '')}`,
    })),
  [page.blocks]
)
```

## Scroll spy

```tsx
const [activeId, setActiveId] = useState<string | null>(null)

useEffect(() => {
  if (headings.length < 3) return
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
    (entries) => {
      const visible = entries.filter((e) => e.isIntersecting)
      if (visible.length > 0) setActiveId(visible[0]!.target.id)
    },
    { rootMargin: '-10% 0px -80% 0px', threshold: 0 }
  )
  headings.forEach(({ id }) => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) observer.observe(el) })
  return () => observer.disconnect()
}, [headings])
```

## TOC panel

```tsx
{headings.length >= 3 && (
  <aside className="hidden md:block sticky top-24 h-fit w-52 shrink-0">
    <p className="mb-2 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide text-neutral-500">Innhold</p>
    <nav>
      <ul className="space-y-1">
        {headings.map((h) => (
          <li key={h.id} style={{ paddingLeft: `${(h.level - 1) * 12}px` }}>
            <a href={`#${h.id}`}
              className={`block truncate text-xs leading-5 ${
                activeId === h.id ? 'font-semibold text-[#1a3d32]' : 'text-neutral-500 hover:text-neutral-800'
              }`}
              onClick={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); document.getElementById(h.id)?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }) }}
            >{h.text}</a>
          </li>
        ))}
      </ul>
    </nav>
  </aside>
)}
```

## Validation checklist

- [ ] No new packages
- [ ] `npm run build` exits 0
- [ ] Pages with ≥3 headings show TOC on desktop
- [ ] Pages with <3 headings show no TOC
- [ ] Clicking TOC entry scrolls to correct heading
- [ ] Active heading highlighted while scrolling
- [ ] TOC hidden on mobile
- [ ] Heading `id` attributes are URL-safe
- [ ] File reads completed
